text.title: API Monitoring — Metrics Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply API Monitoring — Metrics end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: instrument-red
step.action: Add Rate, Errors, Duration histograms per endpoint with labels {method, path_template, status}. Path templating (r4) mandatory.

step.name: instrument-use
step.action: Add Utilization, Saturation, Errors metrics per resource (DB pool, cache, queue depth, thread pool).

step.name: install-tsdb-and-scrape
step.action: Run Prometheus (or compatible) scrape; alert on cardinality explosion before it OOMs the TSDB.

step.name: validate-cardinality
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-api-monitoring-metrics.py --self-test`; check label cardinality stays ≤10k series per metric.

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
